match_prefix: AT RISE: ACTORS enter from the audience
note: LINE 1: JOSHUA, JOHN, ISAAC, TEKA, QUEEN MOTHER, enter from HOUSE LEFT (HL). LINE 2: AHRYIS, ASHMAY, TOM, SINGER, ESTHER, enter from HOUSE RIGHT (HR). Both lines walk through audience between MEZZ. and ORCH. at the same time. LINE 1 go to CENTER STAGE LEFT (CSL) from audience - UPSTAGE (US) of LINE 2, then cross to CENTER STAGE RIGHT (CTR) and EXIT. LINE 2 go to CENTER STAGE RIGHT from audience - DOWNSTAGE (DS) of LINE 2, then cross to CENTER STAGE LEFT and EXIT. Once QUEEN MOTHER is CENTER STAGE she will fall. ESTHER is the only one to react, help her up, then the both EXIT UPSTAGE CENTER (USC) into the house. All others will continue to walk in line and EXIT CSR or CSL. Both lines will continually walk at the same pace so that each turn, cross, and exit is in sync.

match_prefix: AUNT EMMA
note: Once QM and ESTHER enter the house, AUNT EMMA enters from SR then goes USC on the porch.

match_prefix: (MAE enters)
note: MAE enters from HL and will stand between the MEZZ. and ORCH. HL (about 3 seats down). MAE should be doing busy work as AUNT EMMA continues -- tying apron, fixing hair, etc.
